reviews.comment:
Soy socio del ACA y hace algunos años dejé de parar en esta estación de servicio por varios motivos: mala atención, nunca con sistema, baños desastrosos; hoy quise probar y debo decir que cambió todo, playero excelente, todas las tarjetas con su ticket respectivo y baños impecables (con jabón, papel, secamanos y canillas funcionando diez puntos). Puedo recomendarla.

(Translated by Google)
I'm an ACA member, and a few years ago I stopped stopping at this gas station for several reasons: poor service, never a system, disastrous bathrooms. Today I decided to try it, and I must say everything changed. Excellent beach, all cards with their respective tickets, and impeccable bathrooms (with soap, paper, hand dryers, and working faucets, perfect for a living). I can highly recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1Nk1fRzFnRRAB
